stories.name: config-module
stories.title: Maintainer config module and env accessor
stories.description: Create app/src/config/maintainer.ts exporting MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX (decoded from NEXT_PUBLIC_MAINTAINER_NPUBS via publicEnv accessor, splitting on commas, falling back to the D1 default npub; undecodable entries dropped), MAINTAINER_ACTIVE_PUBKEY_HEX (MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX[0] ?? null), MAINTAINER_DISPLAY_NAME (string constant), and isMaintainerPubkey(hex). Add getNextPublicMaintainerNpubs() to publicEnv.ts.

stories.name: source-marker
stories.title: DM source marker for feedback messages
stories.description: Extend buildChatRumor to accept an optional extraTags parameter. Create publishFeedbackMessage wrapper that calls publishDirectMessage-equivalent logic but with ['client','nostling',<version>] and ['l','feedback'] tags on the inner kind-14 rumor. The default publishDirectMessage path must remain unchanged.

stories.name: walled-garden-seeding
stories.title: Seed maintainer keys into walled-garden allow-list at startup
stories.description: In MarmotContext.tsx, add a useEffect on mount (no deps) that calls rememberKnownPeers(MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX) from the new config module. This ensures maintainer keys are always in the ever-known set regardless of group membership, so replies are never dropped by isAllowedDmSender.

stories.name: i18n
stories.title: i18n translations for feedback channel UI
stories.description: Add feedback section to Copy type and both language objects (en, de) in i18n.ts. Keys: settingsRowLabel, pageTitle, encryptedSubtitle, composerPlaceholder, unavailableState.

stories.name: ui-surface
stories.title: Feedback page, settings row, contacts filtering, notification routing
stories.description: Create app/pages/feedback.tsx that renders ContactChat against MAINTAINER_ACTIVE_PUBKEY_HEX with distinct chrome (title from i18n, encrypted subtitle, name from MAINTAINER_DISPLAY_NAME). Add Settings row linking to /feedback (only when feature enabled). Filter isMaintainerPubkey keys from contacts list in contacts.tsx. Route maintainer DM bell entries to /feedback in NotificationBell.tsx.
